description: You are an economist analyzing the output gap. Perform a Hodrick-Prescott (HP) filter analysis on US Real GDP using the 'usa.gdt' dataset. Apply the HP filter to the 'gdp' series with lambda = 1600 to compute the trend and cyclical components, and calculate the 'output_gap' series as (cycle / trend) * 100. Save the augmented dataset containing the original variables, trend, cycle, and output_gap to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/usa_hp_decomposed.gdt. Generate a text report at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/hp_report.txt containing the smoothing parameter, the mean and standard deviation of the output gap, the number of quarters with a negative output gap, and the date of the largest negative output gap. Save the gretl script used for the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/hp_analysis.inp.
